com.mentor.chs.api.workbook.data

Interface IXProviderDataFactory


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXProviderDataFactory
    This factory is used to make the types of data that can be returned from an IXProvider. A provider will use it to create an instance of the type of data it will return in the generate() method.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXFileImageData createFileImageData()
      Creates and returns the image type implementation
      IXImageListData createImageListData()
      Creates and returns the image list type implementation
      IXImageTablePair createImageTablePairData()
      creates a implementation of image table pair.
      IXImageTableList createImageTablePairListData()
      Creates a list of image table pair.
      IXCellData createTableCellData()
      Creates and return a new table cell - for use with IXTableData
      IXTableData createTableData()
      Creates and returns the table type implementation
      IXTextData createTextData()
      Creates and returns the text type implementation

    • Method Detail

      • createTableData

        IXTableData createTableData()
        Creates and returns the table type implementation
        Returns:
        empty table

      • createFileImageData

        Creates and returns the image type implementation
        Returns:
        image data object

      • createImageListData

        Creates and returns the image list type implementation
        Returns:
        empty image list

      • createTextData

        IXTextData createTextData()
        Creates and returns the text type implementation
        Returns:
        empty text

      • createTableCellData

        IXCellData createTableCellData()
        Creates and return a new table cell - for use with IXTableData
        Returns:
        table cell

      • createImageTablePairListData

        Creates a list of image table pair.
        Returns:
        empty image table pair list

      • createImageTablePairData

        creates a implementation of image table pair.
        Returns:
        empty image table pair
